content.full_text:
Rec'd 4/1/90
3-37

DANNY WALSH
33 PAYNE RIVER CIRCLE
SACRAMENTO, CALIFORNIA 95831
(916)393-4825

April 16, 1990

Ms. Blanca Breeze
Fair Political Practices Commission
PO Box 807
Sacramento, California 95804

Dear Ms. Breeze:

It was a pleasure speaking with you the other day with respect
to my particular question. I now request written confirmation of
your oral opinion, either by an advice letter, or some other
written document.

To refresh your memory, the facts of my question are as
follows:

1. I am a former member of the State Water Resources Control
Board. My term expired in February of 1990. As a member of that
Board, I served as Chairman of the Santa Monica Bay Restoration
Project.

2. I am now a private consultant. The Air Resources Board
would like to contract with me to act as the facilitator for the
Santa Monica Bay Restoration Project.

3. The funds to pay for my services would come out of the Air
Resources Board's budget.

4. The Santa Monica Bay Restoration Project is a multi-
federal and state effort designed to assist with the clean-up of
Santa Monica Bay.

To my knowledge, the State Water Resources Control Board and
the Air Resources Board are separate "agencies." Their respective
budgets are considered separately by the legislature. My question:
am I prohibited under Government Code sections 87400-87405, or any
other relevant law from contracting with the Air Resources Board
to act as the facilitator for the Santa Monica Bay Restoration
Project? If no conflict exists, are there any restrictions
proscribed by the Political Reform Act to such a contract, as I
intend to enter into other consulting contracts. Previously you


Ms. Blanca Breeze
April 16, 1990
Page 2

advised me that there was no conflict.  Could you kindly provide
me with written confirmation of your advice? Thank you.

Very truly yours,
[signature]
DANNY WALSH

cc: Janann Sharpless

DECLASSIFIED Authority EO 13526 SEC 3.3(B)(1), (2)
NARA, BY Robert Bauer DATE 01/16/2017

[illegible] without further official action. Violations of the
[illegible] may result in civil and/or criminal penalties.

We believe that the new stated task we outlined
[illegible] Freedom Factor [illegible] will [illegible] the pertinent question of what am the LIVE
with the [illegible] [illegible] [illegible] [illegible]

[illegible]

[illegible] [illegible] [illegible]

[illegible] [illegible] [illegible]

[illegible] [illegible] [illegible]

This page appears to be heavily redacted or degraded, with most of the content being illegible or obscured.
